name: Lebanese Butter Cookies Ghrybe
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in a mixing bowl and beat with an electric mixer for about 10-15 minutes until the butter is white and fluffy.
2. Gradually add both types of sugar, whisking thoroughly to combine.
3. Gradually add the flour, continuing to mix until the dough is well combined and holds together without being sticky.
4. If necessary, add more flour to achieve a firm but not dry consistency.
5. Shape the dough into small balls (about 1.5 inches in diameter) using lightly floured hands.
6. Place each ball on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for about 10-12 minutes, or until the cookies are set and remain white, not browned.
8. Allow the cookies to cool completely on the baking sheet before removing them.
